declared_losses: This is only a scheduling cycle — no artifact is produced yet. The actual synthesis happens in the next wake cycle.
parsed.work_plan: Retrieve the three evidence records (scheduler_gate_separate, artifact_quality_margin_declared, observability_not_quality). In the artifact cycle, synthesize them to enumerate preconditions for valid non-inferiority: (1) scheduler must be separately viable, (2) the 0.10 margin is against append-only mean quality, (3) observability cannot rescue an inferior artifact-quality result. Then state what must be true before claiming non-inferiority.
